files.content:
# phytron.db
# EPICS database for Phytron MCC-1 MINI-W-ETH using StreamDevice
#
# Macros:
#   P    - PV prefix (example: PHYTRON:)
#   PORT - asyn port name configured in st.cmd
#
# This database provides a minimal IOC scaffold for communication testing.

record(ai, "$(P)POS_RBV") {
    field(DESC, "Motor position readback")
    field(DTYP, "stream")
    field(INP,  "@phytron.proto getPosition $(PORT)")
    field(SCAN, "1 second")
    field(PREC, "3")
}

record(ai, "$(P)SPEED_RBV") {
    field(DESC, "Motor speed readback")
    field(DTYP, "stream")
    field(INP,  "@phytron.proto getSpeed $(PORT)")
    field(SCAN, "2 second")
    field(PREC, "3")
}

record(bo, "$(P)MOVE_PLUS") {
    field(DESC, "Move in positive direction")
    field(DTYP, "stream")
    field(OUT,  "@phytron.proto movePlus $(PORT)")
    field(ZNAM, "Idle")
    field(ONAM, "Exec")
}

record(bo, "$(P)MOVE_MINUS") {
    field(DESC, "Move in negative direction")
    field(DTYP, "stream")
    field(OUT,  "@phytron.proto moveMinus $(PORT)")
    field(ZNAM, "Idle")
    field(ONAM, "Exec")
}

record(bo, "$(P)STOP") {
    field(DESC, "Stop motion")
    field(DTYP, "stream")
    field(OUT,  "@phytron.proto stopMotion $(PORT)")
    field(ZNAM, "Idle")
    field(ONAM, "Stop")
}

#!../../bin/linux-x86_64/phytronIOC
# st.cmd
# IOC startup script for Phytron MCC-1 MINI-W-ETH
#
# Adjust the binary path, EPICS environment, and database path as needed
# for your IOC application.

< envPaths

cd "${TOP}"

## Register IOC application
# dbLoadDatabase loads the generated DBD file and registers record/device support.
dbLoadDatabase "dbd/phytronIOC.dbd"
phytronIOC_registerRecordDeviceDriver pdbbase

## User-configurable environment
# PV prefix for all records
epicsEnvSet("P", "PHYTRON:")

# asyn IP port name
epicsEnvSet("PORT", "PHYTRON_TCP")

# Controller network endpoint
epicsEnvSet("HOST", "127.0.0.1")
epicsEnvSet("TCPPORT", "22222")

## Configure TCP/IP communication
# 0 0 0 => noAutoConnect=0, noProcessEos=0, noProcessEos=0
# The controller is expected to use CR/LF line termination.
drvAsynIPPortConfigure("$(PORT)", "$(HOST):$(TCPPORT)", 0, 0, 0)
asynOctetSetOutputEos("$(PORT)", 0, "\r\n")
asynOctetSetInputEos("$(PORT)", 0, "\r\n")

## Optional debug aids
# Uncomment for verbose asyn/StreamDevice diagnostics during commissioning.
# asynSetTraceIOMask("$(PORT)", 0, 2)
# asynSetTraceMask("$(PORT)", 0, 9)

## Load records
# Protocol file phytron.proto is referenced from the database records.
dbLoadRecords("db/phytron.db", "P=$(P),PORT=$(PORT)")

cd "${TOP}/iocBoot/${IOC}"

iocInit

## Optional post-init diagnostics
# dbl
